name: Alternative Tax for Mutual Savings Banks with Life Insurance Business

eligibility.description: Must be a mutual savings bank without capital stock, authorized by State law to conduct life insurance, and maintain separate accounts for the insurance department.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a mutual savings bank to calculate tax separately for its life insurance department using life insurance company tax rates (Subchapter L) rather than standard corporate rates on the combined entity.
